chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 128 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.686/2020 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.687/2020 27.10.2025 Mr. Fahad Hussain Areejo advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of applicant. This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Today learned counsel merely seeks time. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
